'''makojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oompahpah|oompahpah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oompahpah|oompahpah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| makojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mækejeth|mækejeth]] || [[word:mækejej|mækejej]] || [[word:mækejesh|mækejesh]] || [[word:mækeje|mækeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:makokojoth|makokojoth]] || [[word:makokojoj|makokojoj]] || [[word:makokojosh|makokojosh]] || [[word:makokojo|makokojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:makojoth|makojoth]] || [[word:makojoj|makojoj]] || [[word:makojosh|makojosh]] || [[word:makojo|makojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:makofjoth|makofjoth]] || [[word:makofjoj|makofjoj]] || [[word:makofjosh|makofjosh]] || [[word:makofjof|makofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:makojotho|makojotho]] || [[word:makojojo|makojojo]] || [[word:makojosho|makojosho]] || [[word:makojoko|makojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:makojoth|makojoth]] || [[word:makojoj|makojoj]] || [[word:makojosh|makojosh]] || [[word:makojo|makojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:makojothol|makojothol]] || [[word:makojojol|makojojol]] || [[word:makojoshol|makojoshol]] || [[word:makojokol|makojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:makojothotho|makojothotho]] || [[word:makojojojo|makojojojo]] || [[word:makojoshosho|makojoshosho]] || [[word:makojoko|makojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:makojothon|makojothon]] || [[word:makojojon|makojojon]] || [[word:makojoshon|makojoshon]] || [[word:makojokon|makojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:makojothoro|makojothoro]] || [[word:makojojoro|makojojoro]] || [[word:makojoshoro|makojoshoro]] || [[word:makojokoro|makojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
